steps.title: Expand and simplify both sides
steps.content:
Distribute on the left side:
$$10(x+15)+5x = 10x + 150 + 5x = 15x + 150$$

Distribute on the right side:
$$15(x+10) = 15x + 150$$

The equation simplifies to $15x + 150 = 15x + 150$.

steps.title: Recognize an identity
steps.content: Both sides are identical. This is an identity—a statement that is true for every value of $x$. Since the equation is satisfied by all real numbers, there are infinitely many solutions. That matches choice C — C is correct.
